channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Shashi Tharoor's 'Quad' Concern As US Drops "Indo" From Pacific Command Name

media:content.media:description: Tharoor also shared a screenshot of the order issued by the Department of War.

item.description: Over the years, the command emerged as an important institutional channel for India to expand defence cooperation with the US.
item.content:encoded: Over the years, the command emerged as an important institutional channel for India to expand defence cooperation with the US.

item.title: Regime Change, No Nukes, Missiles: Status Of Trump's Goals In Iran War

media:content.media:description: Trump has repeatedly said that his main goal is to prevent Iran from developing a nuclear weapon.

item.description: Shortly after the U.S. and Israel launched airstrikes on Iran on February 28, U.S. President Donald Trump laid out a host of objectives, from
item.content:encoded: Shortly after the U.S. and Israel launched airstrikes on Iran on February 28, U.S. President Donald Trump laid out a host of objectives, from

item.title: James Bond Film "Goldfinger" Was Shot At Resort Where US-Iran Will Sign Deal

media:content.media:description: The Burgenstock resort sits 450 metres above the water on a ridge below the peak.

item.description: Eight kilometres (five miles) from Lucerne in central Switzerland, the Burgenstock mountain dominates the centre of the lake.
item.content:encoded: Eight kilometres (five miles) from Lucerne in central Switzerland, the Burgenstock mountain dominates the centre of the lake.

item.title: Italian Woman Takes On Meta, TikTok After Daughter's Death By Suicide

media:content.media:description: Irene Roggero Ugues said her daughter had been exposed to self-harm content on social media.

item.description: In the span of just a few months, Irene Roggero Ugues watched her daughter Rossella's behaviour change as social media
item.content:encoded: In the span of just a few months, Irene Roggero Ugues watched her daughter Rossella's behaviour change as social media

item.title: US Couple To Keep And Raise Baby Girl Who Isn't Genetically Theirs After Embryo Mix-Up

media:content.media:description: IVF mix-up leads couple to sue clinic yet raise baby with custody agreement reached.

item.description: Tiffany Score and Steven Mills have reached a custody agreement with the girl's biological parents, as per the court documents.
item.content:encoded: Tiffany Score and Steven Mills have reached a custody agreement with the girl's biological parents, as per the court documents.

item.title: Video: Plane Crashes On Texas Highway, Cockpit Window Broken For Rescue

media:content.media:description: People left their vehicles to frantically try to smash the cockpit window and free passengers inside.

item.description: Police say six people were onboard and one was killed. The plane crashed in Laredo shortly after 10 pm.
item.content:encoded: Police say six people were onboard and one was killed. The plane crashed in Laredo shortly after 10 pm.

item.title: France Drops US Spy Software Palantir, Bets On Homegrown AI For Its Spy Agency

media:content.media:description: The move came just 6 months after the DGSI renewed its Palantir contract.

item.description: In a video post on X, Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu said ChapsVision had on Tuesday "been retained by the DGSI ... to substitute the American giant Palantir".
item.content:encoded: In a video post on X, Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu said ChapsVision had on Tuesday "been retained by the DGSI ... to substitute the American giant Palantir".

item.title: US-Iran LIVE Updates: US-Iran Deal To Be Signed In Switzerland On Friday
item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: No Nukes, $300 Billion Fund: What's Inside US-Iran 14-Point Deal

media:content.media:description: The deal declares an "immediate and permanent end to the war on all fronts, including Lebanon"

item.description: The reported text shows that the terms agreed upon between Washington and Tehran have no concrete solution regarding Iran's nuclear programme apart from a pledge to never produce or obtain a nuclear weapon and openness to further discuss other detail
item.content:encoded: The reported text shows that the terms agreed upon between Washington and Tehran have no concrete solution regarding Iran's nuclear programme apart from a pledge to never produce or obtain a nuclear weapon and openness to further discuss other detail

item.title: Elon Musk's AI Tool Grok Was Used In Strikes Against Iran: US

media:content.media:description: US government defended the gas turbines used by a giant data center belonging to Grok.

item.description: The US military's transition to AI is taking time, and in March the government had to acknowledge that Claude was being used for the war in Iran.
item.content:encoded: The US military's transition to AI is taking time, and in March the government had to acknowledge that Claude was being used for the war in Iran.

item.title: G7 Hot Mic Moments: Meloni Has Quit Smoking, Macron Forgets Watch

media:content.media:description: World leaders at the G7 Summit.

item.description: Candid hot-mic conversations captured in between meetings ranged from smoking habits, Macron's missing watch, a jersey gift for Trump.
item.content:encoded: Candid hot-mic conversations captured in between meetings ranged from smoking habits, Macron's missing watch, a jersey gift for Trump.

item.title: Society needs 'new social norms' in the age of AI: Nvidia's Jensen Huang
item.description: "I would advocate that everybody use AI. Just go engage it," Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang said
item.content:encoded: "I would advocate that everybody use AI. Just go engage it," Nvidia's CEO Jensen Huang said

item.title: "We're Most Famous Couple": Giorgia Meloni To PM Modi At G7 Summit. Watch

media:content.media:description: A viral video shows PM Modi and Meloni greeting each other and shaking hands.

item.description: 'Melodi' - a blend of Giorgia Meloni and PM Modi's names - began as an internet joke after their bilateral meeting in 2023.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1114086/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>'Melodi' - a blend of Giorgia Meloni and PM Modi's names - began as an internet joke after their bilateral meeting in 2023.

item.title: Ex-Brazil President Jair Bolsonaro's Son Jailed For 4 Years Over US Lobbying

media:content.media:description: Eduardo Bolsonaro will also be barred from holding public office for eight years.

item.description: Former far-right president Jair Bolsonaro's third son had attempted to curry American favor for his father, who is serving 27 years in prison for coup-plotting in 2022.
item.content:encoded: Former far-right president Jair Bolsonaro's third son had attempted to curry American favor for his father, who is serving 27 years in prison for coup-plotting in 2022.

item.title: US To Give Iran $300 Billion "Reconstruction Fund"? What JD Vance Said

media:content.media:description: US and Iranian officials said on Sunday they had agreed on a framework to end their war

item.description: The fund is reportedly designed to give both sides an economic incentive to conclude a final deal. It's a private investment vehicle, not a reconstruction or reparations programme, and will not include any government money or grants
item.content:encoded: The fund is reportedly designed to give both sides an economic incentive to conclude a final deal. It's a private investment vehicle, not a reconstruction or reparations programme, and will not include any government money or grants

item.title: US Will Allow Iran To 'Immediately' Sell Oil After Signing Peace Deal: Report

media:content.media:description: Iran shut the strait after the US and Israel launched attacks on Iran on February 28.

item.description: The U.S. will allow Iran to immediately begin selling oil and fuel under the memorandum of understanding the two sides reached to end the war, a senior U.S. official
item.content:encoded: The U.S. will allow Iran to immediately begin selling oil and fuel under the memorandum of understanding the two sides reached to end the war, a senior U.S. official

item.title: Satellite Pics Show How US Is Using Iranian Tactic To Sneak Oil Out Of Gulf

media:content.media:description: A satellite image of side-by-side ships at sea, off the coast of Sohar, Oman.

item.description: The United States military has overseen scores of secretive shiptoship oil transfers to keep Gulf
item.content:encoded: The United States military has overseen scores of secretive shiptoship oil transfers to keep Gulf

item.title: US Senate Narrowly Blocks New Bid To Rein In Trump War Powers

media:content.media:description: The Senate voted by 48-47 to block the resolution under the war powers law.

item.description: The Senate voted by 48-47 to block the resolution under the war powers law, which followed a framework agreement announced this week by the White House and Tehran for a further ceasefire and talks to end the conflict.
item.content:encoded: The Senate voted by 48-47 to block the resolution under the war powers law, which followed a framework agreement announced this week by the White House and Tehran for a further ceasefire and talks to end the conflict.

item.title: "Not All Hezbollah": Trump Slams Israeli Attacks On Lebanon At G7 Summit

media:content.media:description: Trump said that "too many people have been killed" in Israeli strikes in Lebanon.

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday issued a rare public rebuke of Israel's military tactics in Lebanon targeting Hezbollah militants, saying it was unnecessary to bomb entire apartment buildings to hunt militants.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday issued a rare public rebuke of Israel's military tactics in Lebanon targeting Hezbollah militants, saying it was unnecessary to bomb entire apartment buildings to hunt militants.

item.title: US-Iran Deal To Be Signed In Switzerland On Friday

media:content.media:description: The deal follows weeks of fraught negotiations and threats of renewed hostilities.

item.description: A US-Iran deal aimed at ending the Middle East war will be signed at Switzerland's mountainside Burgenstock resort on Friday, the Swiss foreign ministry said.
item.content:encoded: A US-Iran deal aimed at ending the Middle East war will be signed at Switzerland's mountainside Burgenstock resort on Friday, the Swiss foreign ministry said.
